category_sources: Official Yices documentation page describes online documentation for the Yices manual and API reference.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use the Yices/Yices 2 project name.
docs_sources: Official yices.csl.sri.com documentation page provides the Yices manual and API reference.
source_facts.repo supplies the official GitHub repository whose README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied; per instruction not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Yices as an SMT solver.
source_facts.executables lists solver CLIs yices, yices-sat, yices-smt, and yices-smt2.
